title: DC Edit | Asha Bhosle’s Legacy Endures
description: For someone who hesitatingly pitched her voice in an era of the metallic Noorjahan, the spirited Geeta Dutt, the enigmatic Surayya and the blossoming Lata, Asha, in hindsight, had probably everything going against her. A Howrah Bridge here or a CID there still did not launch the voice that not only survived the so-called Lata monopoly but also led to a myopic debate on who was the better singer
